mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.layout_json AS configJson, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bi_dashboard_component dc WHERE dc.dashboard_id = d.id ) AS component_count, d.created_at FROM bi_dashboard d ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.layout_json AS configJson, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bi_dashboard_component dc WHERE dc.dashboard_id = d.id ) AS component_count, d.created_at FROM bi_dashboard d ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.layout_json AS configJson, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bi_dashboard_component dc WHERE dc.dashboard_id = d.id ) AS component_count, d.created_at FROM bi_dashboard d WHERE d.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_dashboard (name, layout_json) VALUES (#{name}, IFNULL(#{configJson}, '{}'))
